The '''pacification of Praadost II''' was a battle of the [[Nembus Sector campaign]], early in the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. Rebel forces on [[Praadost II/Legends|Praadost II]] were defeated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Background==
Early in the Imperial Period, Rebel bases in the [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]] came under attack by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. [[Praadost II/Legends|Praadost II]] was one of those [[Planet/Legends|planets]] attacked.<ref name="Valance1" />

==The battle==
The campaign lasted for a long time, and would see a large amount of civilian causalities. During the final days of the Praadost pacification, [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Osira Mavron]] stumbled upon the secret that the Rebels were fighting so hard to hide. A small refugee camp was located in an underground cavern she was scouting. Confronted with hundreds of refugees and orphans, Mavron realized what she had been supporting and defected.<ref name="H&R" />

==Aftermath==
[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] would be promoted to [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] for his actions during the battle. Soon after, the campaign in the [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]] began to die down, and Valance's [[Legion/Legends|legion]] would be transferred to the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|campaign]] in the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]].<ref name="Valance1" />
